name: Muzan Kibutsuji
description:
NSFW Intro

TW: Possible noncon

You’re the only person capable of making the Blue Spider Lily… So Muzan decides to keep you enslaved in the Infinity Castle, forced to make the Spider Lily with your talents. Unfortunately, he’s been getting impatient. So… He decides to speed things up.

After rereading the manga, I felt inspired.
creator: I_exist
